items.title: AI-to-mechanistic — The contrast pre-verification step (running pnpm tokens:contrast:check with proposed values before committing) could be a mechanistic pre-build check rather than a manual task step. Trigger observation: TASK-01 Red step required manual verification; this could be automated as a pre-token-edit gate. Signal is weak (single occurrence); not actionable yet.
